name: change-case
usage_summary: Used in a single file: packages/cli-kit/src/public/common/string.ts. Six named exports are imported: camelCase, capitalCase, constantCase, paramCase, snakeCase, pascalCase. Each is wrapped in a one-line public helper function (camelize, capitalizeWords, hyphenate, underscore, constantize, pascalize) that forms part of the cli-kit public API exported via `@shopify/cli-kit/common/string`. These helpers are called from multiple packages across the monorepo.
how_to_remove: Replace all six change-case functions with inline implementations using regex-based transformations. Each individual transform is ~5–10 lines of regex logic; edge-case parity (Unicode, numbers, consecutive uppercase, etc.) requires careful testing. The wrappers are part of the public cli-kit API so no call-site changes are needed, but the underlying implementations must be thoroughly validated against the existing test suite.
replacement_reason: change-case is actively maintained (8 releases in the last 24 months). Although the six functions could theoretically be inlined, the effort is medium due to edge-case coverage requirements, and there is no compelling maintenance reason to remove a healthy dependency that provides a clean, well-tested API.
